# TASK_TEMPLATE.md

**Task ID:** WEV-XXXX  
**Title:**  
**Status:** Pending | In Progress | Blocked | Complete  
**Priority:** Critical | High | Standard | Low  
**Session Type:** Planning | Specification | Architecture | Implementation | Review

---

## Summary [TASK-TEMPLATE-SUMMARY]

This template defines a bounded unit of work for Weave. Every task should be small enough to complete in a short supervised session and concrete enough that completion can be verified quickly.

---

## Objective [TASK-TEMPLATE-OBJECTIVE]

Describe what this task is intended to accomplish.

---

## Why This Matters [TASK-TEMPLATE-WHY]

Explain why this task is important to Weave’s goals, phase, or workflow.
